result.synthesis_reasoning: All sources agree that there is no concrete error cascade captured in the logs, and topology confirms a plausible link from productcatalogservice to frontend. The strongest signal is the unobserved root cause possibility: productcatalogservice is implicated by the symptom description but has no logs in the window, which is exactly the unobserved root cause scenario described. Therefore, rank 1 on productcatalogservice with moderate to high confidence due to structural plausibility and the explicit unobserved root cause rule. The frontend as a candidate is considered but ranked after, since it represents the symptom endpoint rather than a deeper causative service. The TCB-RCA contribution is neutral in this case (no deeper temporal anomaly detected).
